flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Idaho State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Idaho State University fell 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($23.0k → $20.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Idaho State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (6.8k → 7.6k).
